title: Payroll Schedule and Accessing Pay Stubs
text:
Q: What is the payroll schedule and how can I access my pay stubs?
A: Our payroll is processed bi-weekly, with paydays occurring every other Friday. Employees can expect their pay to be deposited into their bank accounts by 9:00 AM on payday. To access your pay stubs, log in to the Employee Portal using your company credentials. Once logged in, navigate to the 'Payroll' section, where you will find a link to 'View Pay Stubs'. Here, you can view, download, and print your pay stubs for your records. If you encounter any issues accessing your pay stubs or have questions regarding your payroll, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com or call extension 1234. Remember to check your pay stub for accuracy, including hours worked and deductions, and report any discrepancies immediately.
